creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
While working on a update for zeigeist, I ran into the follow plist issue while testing cairo-dock-plugins. Cairo-dock-plugins has some plugins that aren't handled yet by the current options set. Can you either disable these plugins or add options for them?

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: lib/cairo-dock/cairo-dock-launcher-API-daemon

Error: Orphaned: lib/cairo-dock/libcd-Messaging-Menu.so
Error: Orphaned: lib/cairo-dock/libcd-status-notifier.so
Error: Orphaned: lib/cairo-dock/libcd-terminal.so

===> Error: Plist issues found.
